name: fiab-report-subscriptions
description: CSA Loom — report subscriptions timer Function. On the LOOM schedule it reads enabled report subscriptions from Cosmos, renders each report via the real Power BI ExportTo REST job (PDF/PPTX/PNG), archives the file to ADLS, emails it via the report-subscription delivery Logic App, and writes a delivery-log row. Azure-native parity with Fabric/Power BI report subscriptions — no Microsoft Fabric dependency.
